section_titles: Section 1: Short title, extent and commencement
Section 2: Definitions
chapters.summary: This chapter introduces the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988, and defines key terms used in the Act. It provides the short title, extent, and commencement of the Act.

chapters.chapter_title: Chapter II: Licensing of Drivers of Motor Vehicles
section_titles: Section 3: Necessity for driving licence
Section 4: Age limit in connection with driving of motor vehicles
chapters.summary: This chapter deals with the licensing of drivers of motor vehicles, including the necessity for a driving licence, age limits, and the responsibilities of vehicle owners.

chapters.chapter_title: Chapter III: Licensing of Conductors of Stage Carriages
section_titles: Section 29: Necessity for conductor’s licence
Section 30: Grant of conductor’s licence
chapters.summary: This chapter focuses on the licensing of conductors of stage carriages, including the necessity for a conductor's licence and the grant of such licences.

chapters.chapter_title: Chapter IV: Registration of Motor Vehicles
section_titles: Section 39: Necessity for registration
Section 40: Registration, where to be made
chapters.summary: This chapter covers the registration of motor vehicles, including the necessity for registration, where to register, and the process of registration.

chapters.chapter_title: Chapter V: Control of Transport Vehicles
section_titles: Section 66: Necessity for permits
Section 67: Power to State Government to control road transport
chapters.summary: This chapter deals with the control of transport vehicles, including the necessity for permits and the power of the State Government to control road transport.

chapters.chapter_title: Chapter VI: Special Provisions Relating to State Transport Undertakings
section_titles: Section 97: Definition
Section 98: Chapter to override Chapter V and other laws
chapters.summary: This chapter provides special provisions relating to State transport undertakings, including definitions and the relationship with other laws.

chapters.chapter_title: Chapter VII: Construction, Equipment and Maintenance of Motor Vehicles
section_titles: Section 109: General provision regarding construction and maintenance of vehicles
Section 110: Power of Central Government to make rules
chapters.summary: This chapter focuses on the construction, equipment, and maintenance of motor vehicles, including general provisions and the power of the Central Government to make rules.

section_titles: Section 112: Limits of speed
Section 113: Limits of weight and limitations on use
chapters.summary: This chapter deals with the control of traffic, including speed limits, weight limits, and other regulations.

chapters.chapter_title: Chapter IX: Motor Vehicles Temporarily Leaving or Visiting India
section_titles: Section 139: Power of Central Government to make rules
chapters.summary: This chapter provides provisions for motor vehicles temporarily leaving or visiting India, including the power of the Central Government to make rules.

chapters.chapter_title: Chapter X: Liability Without Fault in Certain Cases
section_titles: Section 140: Liability to pay compensation in certain cases on the principle of no fault
Section 141: Provisions as to other right to claim compensation for death or permanent disablement
chapters.summary: This chapter deals with liability without fault in certain cases, including the principle of no fault and provisions for claiming compensation.

chapters.chapter_title: Chapter XI: Insurance of Motor Vehicles Against Third Party Risks
section_titles: Section 145: Definitions
Section 146: Necessity for insurance against third party risk
chapters.summary: This chapter focuses on the insurance of motor vehicles against third party risks, including definitions and the necessity for insurance.

section_titles: Section 165: Claims Tribunals
Section 166: Application for compensation
chapters.summary: This chapter deals with claims tribunals, including their establishment and the process of applying for compensation.

chapters.chapter_title: Chapter XIII: Offences, Penalties and Procedure
section_titles: Section 177: General provision for punishment of offences
Section 178: Penalty for travelling without pass or ticket and for dereliction of duty on the part of conductor and refusal to ply contract carriage, etc.
chapters.summary: This chapter provides provisions for offences, penalties, and procedure, including general provisions for punishment and specific penalties for various offences.

section_titles: Section 211: Power to levy fee
Section 212: Publication, commencement and laying of rules and notifications
chapters.summary: This chapter includes miscellaneous provisions, such as the power to levy fees and the publication of rules and notifications.
